title: capability.changed data (v2)
description: Type is in the design.md 1.2.1 enum but its data fields are not pinned in 1.2.2; this shape is pinned here (Phase 0 resolution): the capability that changed (modality, endpoint, feature flag), how it changed, and canonicalized old/new values.

old.description: Canonicalized previous value; null when the capability is new

new.description: Canonicalized new value; null when the capability was removed
